details.productUrlName: Corpse Knight Reminder Card Knights Charge Brawl Deck

customAttributes.description:
Hello!
Please open this before playing.

Read before playing
This Brawl Deck includes a misprinted version of the Core Set 2020 card Corpse Knight.
Corpse Knight's intended power/toughness is 2/2, but the copy included in this deck was mistakenly printed as a 2/3.
To ensure that you have an accurate version to play with, we have included this corrected copy of Corpse Knight. We recommend that you remove the 2/3 version and replace it with this one.
